dailyNews.description: A conflict that began on February 28 with a US-Israeli bombing campaign on Iran has rapidly engulfed the entire region.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Iran rejects US' ceasefire proposal, lays out five conditions to end war, says report
dailyNews.description: Iran on Wednesday (local time) rejected the proposal from the US that was aimed at halting the war in the Middle East, insisting that a ceasefire will only take place on the Islamic Republic's terms and timeline. The country has also listed out five conditions to end the war

dailyNews.title: Middle East war: Oil crisis from US-Iran war could boost China’s EV makers as fuel prices surge, says report
dailyNews.description: Middle East war: Beijing's shift to renewable energy and electric vehicles has reduced its oil consumption by at least 10%. The ongoing Middle East conflict may further benefit China's EV industry, as higher oil prices drive global expansion, particularly in Asia.

dailyNews.description: Each montage typically runs for about two minutes, though some have been longer, according to the report.

dailyNews.title: Silver prices surge by 6 per cent after 10 days of slump. Check rates here
dailyNews.description: Analysts attributed the rebound of Silver prices to strong positive sentiment in global precious metals markets and a weaker US dollar.

dailyNews.title: ‘Shameful, insensitive’: Supreme Court raps Haryana Police over probe into 3-year-old's rape in Gurgaon, SIT formed
dailyNews.description: The top court issued show cause notices to officials of Gurugram Police and asked them why action should not be taken against them for shoddy investigation in the case

dailyNews.title: ‘US lost initiative weeks ago’: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger says Iran now holds upper hand in West Asia war
dailyNews.description: Former MI6 chief Alex Younger asserts Iran has gained the upper hand in its conflict with the US, aided by strategic decisions and a perceived civilizational war. The potential for US-Iran negotiations exists, with Pakistan offering to mediate talks.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: Thomas Edison on hard work — ‘Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration’
dailyNews.description: Thomas Edison’s timeless insight cuts through the myth of instant brilliance, reminding us that sustained effort—not just ideas—drives real success.

dailyNews.title: Spring break crackdown cuts arrests in hot spot while chaos spreads to other party hubs
dailyNews.description: Miami Beach reports a 24% drop in spring break arrests in 2026, says Commissioner Alex Fernandez, while Daytona Beach and Fort Lauderdale continue battling seasonal chaos.

dailyNews.title: Stomach issues might have nothing to do with eating habits, scientists reveal why
dailyNews.description: New study reveals childhood stress may cause lifelong digestive problems. Research shows early trauma disrupts the brain-gut communication, leading to IBS.

dailyNews.description: María Corina Machado is pitching Venezuela as a top U.S. oil partner after she said the Trump administration’s arrest of former dictator Nicolás Maduro opened up a “new era."

dailyNews.title: Comer tells Newsom to 'lawyer up' as House Oversight launches California fraud probe
dailyNews.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer launched a probe into alleged California hospice fraud, saying scale could exceed findings in Minnesota.

dailyNews.title: Your internet router could be China-linked: FCC cracks down on ‘unacceptable’ security risks
dailyNews.description: The FCC is moving to block new foreign-made internet routers from U.S. markets, warning that overseas supply chains pose serious national security risks.

dailyNews.title: U.S. and Iran Are Talking About Ways to End the War: What to Know
dailyNews.description: The United States is discussing ways to end hostilities with Iran, even as President Trump continues to threaten attacks and as the Pentagon dispatches more troops.

dailyNews.title: Iran mocks Trump, rejects points suggested by U.S. for peace talks
dailyNews.description: Iran's state media say the regime has rejected points suggested by the Trump administration as the basis of a potential peace deal.

dailyNews.title: Iraq war veteran calls out Trump's contradictions on Iran war
dailyNews.description: Phil Klay, a  U.S. Marine veteran who fought in Iraq and is an English professor at Fairfield University, weighs in on the U.S. operation against Iran and the contradictions among members of the Trump administration on the conflict's objectives.

dailyNews.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

dailyNews.title: Stock market, oil prices react to Trump's Iran negotiation claims
dailyNews.description: Oil prices dropped with news of possible U.S.-Iran peace talks. Isabel Wang, a markets reporter for MarketWatch, joins with more.

dailyNews.title: Iran rejects U.S. ceasefire offer, demands sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he could send National Guard to airports 'for more help'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says he is considering sending the National Guard to airports where  TSA officer absences have led to long lines.

dailyNews.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
dailyNews.description: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.

dailyNews.title: Additional Troops Deployed to Middle East as Trump Claims Victory
dailyNews.description: More than 1,000 additional troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are heading to the Middle East, according to two sources. The announcement came as President Donald Trump in the Oval Office Tuesday said, “We’ve won this, this war has been won.” NBC's Richard Engel reports for TODAY on the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: DOJ disclosed 'damning evidence' that Trump procured classified documents, top Democrat says
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department released documents to Congress that included "damning evidence" about President Donald Trump's procurement of highly sensitive documents, including some related to his business interests, when he left office after his first term, Rep.
